steps.title: Check current localai deployment
steps.description:
Verify your localai version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
helm list -n localai 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working localai installation.

steps.title: Review localai configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant localai configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
kubectl get configmap -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=localai
```
No support for OpenCL.

Implementation of CLBlast to provide support for OpenCL.

steps.title: Apply the fix for CLBlast support
steps.description:
Right, sorry - I need to update the building instructions but will make it part of the website directly. I didn't added the deps as part of the container image, but should be able to build locally from master with:

```
make BUILD_TYPE=clblast build
```
```yaml
make BUILD_TYPE=clblast build
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
kubectl get events -n localai --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "CLBlast support" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Right, sorry - I need to update the building instructions but will make it part of the website directly. I didn't added the deps as part of the container image, but should be able to build locally from master with:

```
make BUILD_TYPE=clblast build
```

env:
    - name: THREADS
      value: 8
    - name: CONTEXT_SIZE
      value: 512
    - name: MODELS_PATH
      value: "/models"
    - name: IMAGE_PATH
      value: /tmp
    - name: BUILD_TYPE
      value: clblast
    - name: GO_TAGS
      value: stablediffusion
    - name: DEBUG
      value: "true"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with localai installed or the issue environment reproducible.
